case_title: ROLDAN, MARITZA VS NWIHIM, ADOLPHUS et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-24-2006, OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-13-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ROLDAN, MARITZA AS TO DEFENDANT NWIHIM, ADOLPHUS NWIHIM, ROSEMARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-24-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT NWIHIM, ADOLPHUS HEARING SET FOR OCT-29-2007 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY NWIHIM, ADOLPHUS, NWIHIM, ROSEMARY ON OCT-29-2007 - GRANTED. F. RAYRAY, CLERK; JPT MICHELE MCGILL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT NWIHIM, ADOLPHUS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ROLDAN, MARITZA ROSEMARY NWIHIM DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE ON AUGUST 21, 2007. F. RAYRAY, CLERK JPT MICHELE MCGILL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTE:NO EXHIBITS ON FILE/NOR DESIGNATED IN COURT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROLDAN, MARITZA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NWIHIM, ADOLPHUS NWIHIM, ROSEMARY $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,528.00, DEFENDANT ROSEMARY NWIHIM-DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE-NO SERVICE OF CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SHERIFF DEPARTMENT FILES DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE RE POS; NUMEROUS ATTEMPTS MADE, NO RESPONSE, FROM DEFENDANT.
